reading_units.text: 子曰：「人皆曰『予知』，驅而納諸罟擭陷阱之中，而莫之知辟也。人皆曰『予知』，擇乎中庸，而不能期月守也。」

layers.translation_en: The Master said "Men all say, 'We are wise'; but being driven forward and taken in a net, a trap, or a pitfall, they know not how to escape. Men all say, 'We are wise'; but happening to choose the course of the Mean, they are not able to keep it for a round month."

chapter.text: 子曰：「人皆曰予知，驅而納諸罟擭陷阱之中，而莫之知辟也。人皆曰予知，擇乎中庸而不能期月守也。」

source_title: 四書章句集注 : 中庸章句
